hero.title: Process your receipts
hero.subtitle: Mercurio extracts the data from your Yape, BCP, Plin and other receipts with AI-powered OCR, receives them over WhatsApp, and syncs them to Google Sheets.
hero.subtitleHighlight: Less manual work, no more hand-typed spreadsheets.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card · Free plan forever
hero.ocrAccuracyDesc: AI data extraction for Peruvian receipts.
hero.realTimeProcessingDesc: Send over WhatsApp and get the data instantly.

trust.title: Built on a foundation you can trust

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: From a receipt to structured data in three steps, with no manual work.
howItWorks.step1Desc: You or your team send the receipt image over WhatsApp or upload it to the dashboard.
howItWorks.step2Desc: The OCR engine detects the type (Yape, BCP, Plin, Binance) and extracts amount, date, operation and more.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The data lands in your dashboard and Google Sheets, ready for your accounting.

features.sectionSubtitle: Features built for businesses that process receipts every day.
features.intelligentOcrDesc: AI that processes BCP, Yape, Plin and Binance receipts with high accuracy. Automatic classification and data extraction.
features.whatsappIntegrationDesc: Send receipts directly over WhatsApp. Real-time processing with instant notifications.
features.googleSheetsSyncDesc: Automatic export to Google Sheets. Your data always ready for accounting.
features.awsServerlessDesc: Built on AWS with auto-scaling and 99.9% uptime.
features.enterpriseSecurityDesc: Multi-tenant architecture with full per-organization data isolation and end-to-end encryption.
features.teamManagementDesc: Role-based access control, user permissions and audit trails.
features.customParsersDesc: Build custom parsers for any receipt type. The engine adapts to your business formats.

integrations.sectionSubtitle: Mercurio fits into the workflow you already use, without changing how you work.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Start free and move to Pro when you need it. No surprises.
pricing.referentialNote: Prices in Peruvian soles (PEN). Payments are processed securely with Culqi.
pricing.freeDesc: To try Mercurio and for small projects
pricing.enterpriseDesc: For large organizations with custom needs
pricing.customSolutionDesc: Let's talk about enterprise features, custom integrations and volume pricing.

pricingPage.heroTitle: A price for every stage of your business
pricingPage.heroSubtitle: Start free today. No credit card, no commitments.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Got another question? Email us at hello@mercuriohub.io.
faq.q1: What receipt types does Mercurio support?
faq.a1: We process Yape, BCP, Plin and Binance receipts, and you can build custom parsers for other formats.
faq.q2: Do I need a credit card to start?
faq.a2: No. The Free plan is free forever and requires no card. You only pay if you choose to move to Pro.
faq.a3: You can send them over WhatsApp or upload them directly from the dashboard. Mercurio processes them in real time.
faq.a4: Yes. We use multi-tenant architecture with per-organization isolation and end-to-end encryption on AWS.
faq.a5: Payments in soles are processed securely with Culqi. You can cancel anytime.

cta.title: Start automating
cta.subtitle: Create your free account in minutes and let Mercurio do the manual work for you.
cta.footerTagline: Mercurio — Financial automation for Latin America.

footer.tagline: Automate the processing of your financial receipts with AI.

complaint.title: Complaints Book
complaint.intro: Under Peru's Consumer Protection Code (Law No. 29571), we provide this virtual Complaints Book (Libro de Reclamaciones). Fill out the form and you will receive a copy of your complaint, with its reference number, by email.
complaint.isMinor: The complainant is a minor (representation by a parent or guardian is required).
complaint.kindReclamo: Reclamo — dissatisfaction with the product or service
complaint.kindQueja: Queja — dissatisfaction with the service or process
complaint.requestHelp: Clearly state the resolution you expect.
complaint.legalNote: Filing a complaint does not prevent you from using other dispute-resolution channels, nor is it a prerequisite for filing a claim with INDECOPI.
complaint.successMessage: We have registered your complaint and sent a copy to your email. We will respond within the legal timeframe (up to 15 business days).
complaint.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

signup.title: Start free
signup.subtitle: Create your organization and start processing receipts
signup.passwordHelp: Must contain: 8+ characters, uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character (!@#$%...)
signup.termsAgreement: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
signup.successMessage: Your account has been created! We sent a verification code to your email. Redirecting you to verify your account...
signup.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
